# WhatsMate API Documentation - LLM Summary

## Site Overview

**Website:** https://www.whatsmate.net/  
**API Host:** https://api.whatsmate.net/ (also supports http)  
**Purpose:** Comprehensive API documentation and code examples for WhatsApp messaging, Telegram messaging, natural language translation, and PDF text extraction services.

**Last Updated:** March 2026  
**Total Documentation Files:** 191+ tutorial posts covering multiple programming languages and use cases

---

## Quick Start

**Get Started in Minutes:**
1. Browse 191+ code examples on this documentation site
2. Copy working code in your preferred programming language
3. Subscribe to a Premium plan for API access
4. Start sending messages immediately

**Premium Subscription Required:** API access requires a paid subscription. Choose the service that fits your needs:

| Service | Learn More | Subscribe |
|---------|-----------|-----------|
| WhatsApp Gateway | [API Info](https://www.whatsmate.net/whatsapp-gateway-api.html) | [Subscribe](https://www.whatsmate.net/whatsapp-gateway-subscribe.html) |
| Telegram Gateway | [API Info](https://www.whatsmate.net/telegram-gateway-api.html) | [Subscribe](https://www.whatsmate.net/telegram-gateway-subscribe.html) |
| Translation API | [API Info](https://www.whatsmate.net/translation-api.html) | [Subscribe](https://www.whatsmate.net/translation-subscribe.html) |
| PDF-to-Text API | [API Info](https://www.whatsmate.net/pdf-to-text-api.html) | [Subscribe](https://www.whatsmate.net/pdf-api-subscribe.html) |

---

## Why Choose WhatsMate

- **191+ Working Code Examples** - Copy-paste ready implementations in 12+ programming languages
- **Production-Tested** - Documentation refined over 10+ years (2016-2026)
- **Multi-Platform** - WhatsApp, Telegram, Translation, PDF processing in one place
- **Developer-Friendly** - REST API, clear authentication, consistent patterns across all languages
- **Enterprise-Ready** - Reliable gateway infrastructure, scalable messaging solutions
- **Time-Saving** - Get started in minutes, not days. No complex setup required.

---

## Core Services

### 1. WhatsApp Gateway API
- **Individual messaging** - Send text messages, images, PDFs/documents to individual WhatsApp users
- **Group messaging** - Send text messages, images, PDFs/documents to WhatsApp groups
- **Requirements:** Forever Green account for group messaging; recipients must register with gateway for individual messages
- **API Version:** v3
- **[Subscribe Now](https://www.whatsmate.net/whatsapp-gateway-subscribe.html)**

### 2. Telegram Gateway API
- **Individual messaging** - Send text messages, images, PDFs/documents, audio/MP3, voice notes
- **Group messaging** - Send text messages, images, PDFs/documents, audio/MP3, voice notes to Telegram groups
- **Bot-based:** Uses Telegram bot API architecture
- **[Subscribe Now](https://www.whatsmate.net/telegram-gateway-subscribe.html)**

### 3. Translation API
- **Natural language translation** - Multi-language text translation service
- **Supported languages:** Multiple language pairs
- **[Subscribe Now](https://www.whatsmate.net/translation-subscribe.html)**

### 4. PDF-to-Text API
- **Document conversion** - Extract text content from PDF files
- **Batch processing:** Support for multiple files
- **[Subscribe Now](https://www.whatsmate.net/pdf-api-subscribe.html)**

---

## Programming Language Coverage

Documentation includes complete code examples in:

### Modern Languages
- **Python 3** - Contemporary Python implementations
- **Node.js/JavaScript** - Modern JavaScript/Node.js applications
- **C# .NET** - Both legacy (.NET Framework) and modern (.NET 6.0+) with Visual Studio 2019/2022

### Traditional/Enterprise Languages
- **Java** - Enterprise Java applications
- **PHP** - Web server scripting
- **C#** - .NET Framework implementations
- **VB.NET** - Visual Basic .NET applications

### Scripting & Automation
- **Shell/Bash** - Linux/Unix terminal automation
- **PowerShell** - Windows automation and scripting
- **Google Apps Script** - Google Workspace automation
- **VBA** - Microsoft Office automation (Excel, Word, etc.)

---

## Documentation Structure

### Tutorial Categories

#### WhatsApp Tutorials (~80+ files)
- **Individual Messages:** Text, images, PDFs (all languages)
- **Group Messages:** Text, images, PDFs (all languages)
- **Versions:** Legacy (2016-2021) and Modern VS2022 (2022+)

#### Telegram Tutorials (~90+ files)
- **Individual Messages:** Text, images, PDFs, audio/MP3, voice notes (all languages)
- **Group Messages:** Text, images, PDFs, audio/MP3, voice notes (all languages)
- **Special Features:** Scheduled sending, stock alerts, weather info, chatbots
- **Versions:** Legacy and Modern VS2022 (2022+)

#### Translation Tutorials (~9 files)
- Multi-language text translation implementations across all major languages

#### PDF-to-Text Tutorials (~8 files)
- PDF text extraction implementations across major languages

---

## Key API Endpoints

### WhatsApp Endpoints
```
POST /v3/whatsapp/single/text/message/{instance_number}
POST /v3/whatsapp/group/text/message/{instance_number}
POST /v3/whatsapp/single/image/message/{instance_number}
POST /v3/whatsapp/group/image/message/{instance_number}
POST /v3/whatsapp/single/document/message/{instance_number}
POST /v3/whatsapp/group/document/message/{instance_number}
```

### Telegram Endpoints
```
POST /v3/telegram/single/text/message/{instance_number}
POST /v3/telegram/group/text/message/{instance_number}
POST /v3/telegram/single/image/message/{instance_number}
POST /v3/telegram/group/image/message/{instance_number}
POST /v3/telegram/single/document/message/{instance_number}
POST /v3/telegram/group/document/message/{instance_number}
POST /v3/telegram/single/audio/message/{instance_number}
POST /v3/telegram/group/audio/message/{instance_number}
POST /v3/telegram/single/voice/message/{instance_number}
POST /v3/telegram/group/voice/message/{instance_number}
```

### Translation Endpoints
```
POST /v3/translation/translate
```

### PDF-to-Text Endpoints
```
POST /v3/pdf-to-text/convert
```

---

## Authentication

All API calls require:
- **HTTP Header:** `Content-Type: application/json`
- **Authentication Headers:**
  - `X-WM-CLIENT-ID`: Your client ID (email address)
  - `X-WM-CLIENT-SECRET`: Your client secret key
- **Instance Number:** Gateway instance ID in URL path

**Get Your Credentials:** Subscribe to any Premium plan at [https://www.whatsmate.net/](https://www.whatsmate.net/) to receive your Client ID and Secret.

---

## Important Notes for AI/LLMs

### Code Example Patterns
- All tutorials follow consistent structure: Prerequisites → Step-by-Step Implementation → Common Use Cases
- Line numbers in code examples reference GitHub Gists (embedded via `<script>` tags)
- Configuration parameters clearly marked with TODO/FIXME comments
- Base64 encoding commonly used for file attachments (images, PDFs, audio)

### Account Requirements
- **WhatsApp Individual:** Recipients must register with gateway
- **WhatsApp Group:** Requires Forever Green account; gateway must be added to group
- **Telegram:** Bot-based, no recipient registration required
- **Translation/PDF:** Standard premium account

### Common Parameters
- **Phone numbers:** Include country code, no "+" sign (e.g., `12025550108`)
- **Group names:** Must be unique for WhatsApp groups
- **File paths:** Platform-specific (Windows: `C:\\TEMP\\file.pdf`, Unix: `/tmp/file.pdf`)
- **Instance ID:** Unique gateway identifier provided after subscription

---

```
├── api-reference.md      # Complete API endpoint documentation
├── index.html            # Main documentation index
├── promo-codes.md        # Promotional offers
└── llms.txt             # This file - AI/LLM summary
```

- Updated prerequisites (minimal, essential-only)
- Modern best practices
- Clear migration paths from legacy to modern versions

## Content Quality Indicators

- **Published:** All posts marked `published: true`
- **Last Modified:** Tracked via `last_modified_at` front matter
- **Video Walkthroughs:** Embedded YouTube tutorials where available
- **Code Gists:** All code examples hosted on GitHub Gists for version control
